nodes.name: Clinical Concept Library
nodes.description: This model creates one record per value set member, but it includes relevant fields for each value set member taken from the clnical_concepts and coding_systems tables.

nodes.name: Condition
nodes.description: The core condition table contains information related to medical  conditions patients have, including problems, admitting diagnosis codes,  and billable diagnosis codes.

columns.name: condition_id
columns.description: Unique identifier for each condition in the table.

columns.name: person_id
columns.description: Unique identifier for each person in the dataset.

columns.name: member_id
columns.description: Identifier that links a patient to a particular insurance product or health plan. A patient can have more than one member_id because they can have more than one insurance product/plan.

columns.name: patient_id
columns.description: Identifier that links a patient to a particular clinical source system.

columns.name: encounter_id
columns.description: Unique identifier for each encounter in the dataset.

columns.name: claim_id
columns.description: Unique identifier for a claim. Each claim represents a distinct healthcare service or set of services provided to a patient.

columns.name: recorded_date
columns.description: Date when the condition was recorded.

columns.name: onset_date
columns.description: Date when the condition first occurred.

columns.name: resolved_date
columns.description: Date when the condition was resolved.

columns.name: status
columns.description: Status of the record (e.g., condition, test, etc).

columns.name: condition_type
columns.description: The type of condition i.e. problem, admitting, or billing.

columns.name: source_code_type
columns.description: The type of code reported in the source system (e.g., ICD-10 code, NDC, lab, etc)

columns.name: source_code
columns.description: The code in the source system (e.g., the ICD-10 code, NDC, lab, etc)
columns.terminologyNote: **Note: this terminology set is too large to be loaded as a seed and is instead loaded from public cloud storage for supported adapters.

columns.name: source_description
columns.description: Description of the source code in the source system.

columns.name: normalized_code_type
columns.description: The normalized type of code.

columns.name: normalized_code
columns.description: The normalized code.
columns.terminologyNote: **Note: this terminology set is too large to be loaded as a seed and is instead loaded from public cloud storage for supported adapters.

columns.name: normalized_description
columns.description: Normalized description of the code.

columns.name: mapping_method
columns.description: mapping method used to populate the normalized codes and descriptions.  Can be manual (fields were populated in input layer), automatic (dictionary codes matching the source code were found and was automatically populated) or custom (populated by normalization engine)

columns.name: condition_rank
columns.description: The numerical ranking of the condition. For conditions derived from medical claims, condition_rank is set from the diagnosis code position on the claim, so diagnosis_code_1 becomes condition_rank = 1, diagnosis_code_2 becomes condition_rank = 2, and so on through diagnosis_code_25. For conditions sourced from the input layer condition table, this field is passed through without transformation from the mapped input value. A condition_rank of 1 indicates a primary diagnosis code, and any condition_rank greater than 1 indicates a secondary diagnosis code.

columns.name: present_on_admit_code
columns.description: The present_on_admit_code related to the condition.

columns.name: present_on_admit_description
columns.description: The description of the present_on_admit_code for the condition.

columns.name: data_source
columns.description: User-configured field that indicates the data source.

columns.name: tuva_last_run
columns.description: The last time the data was refreshed. Generated by `dbt_utils.pretty_time` as the local time of the `dbt run` environment. Timezone is configurable via the `tuva_last_run` var.

nodes.name: Eligibility
nodes.description: The eligibility table contains information on patient health plan and  supplemental insurance eligibility.

columns.name: eligibility_id
columns.description: Unique identifier for each eligibility row in the table.

columns.name: person_id
columns.description: Unique identifier for each person in the dataset.

columns.name: member_id
columns.description: Identifier that links a patient to a particular insurance product or health plan. A patient can have more than one member_id because they can have more than one insurance product/plan.

columns.name: subscriber_id
columns.description: Identifier that links a patient to a particular insurance product or health plan.

columns.name: birth_date
columns.description: The birth date of the patient.

columns.name: death_date
columns.description: Date the patient died if there is one.

columns.name: enrollment_start_date
columns.description: Date the patient's insurance eligibility began.

columns.name: enrollment_end_date
columns.description: Date the patient's insurance eligibility ended.

columns.name: payer
columns.description: Name of the payer (i.e. health insurer) providing coverage.

columns.name: payer_type
columns.description: Type of payer (e.g. commercial, medicare, medicaid, etc.).

columns.name: plan
columns.description: Name of the plan (i.e. sub contract) providing coverage.

columns.name: original_reason_entitlement_code
columns.description: Original reason for Medicare entitlement code.

columns.name: dual_status_code
columns.description: Indicates whether the patient is dually eligible for Medicare and Medicaid.

columns.name: medicare_status_code
columns.description: Indicates how the patient became eligible for Medicare.

columns.name: enrollment_status
columns.description: Indicates the type of enrollment status for a beneficiary. Used for determining risk score coefficients. If unsure of the enrollment status,  leave this field null so Tuva can determine the enrollment status based on the beneficiary information.

columns.name: hospice_flag
columns.description: Whether the patient is in hospice.

columns.name: snp_type
columns.description: Special Needs Plan type (C-SNP, D-SNP, I-SNP). Null when non-SNP.

columns.name: medicaid_indicator
columns.description: Medicaid coverage indicator (1 = Yes, 0 = No). Corresponds to CMS NEMCAID field. Used for New Enrollee risk score calculations when dual_status_code is insufficient.

columns.name: long_term_institutional_flag
columns.description: Whether the patient is in an institutional setting for longer than 30 days.

columns.name: part_d_raf_type
columns.description: Part D Risk Adjustment Factor type (CE, NE, PE, NP). Null when no Part D coverage.

columns.name: low_income_subsidy_indicator
columns.description: Low Income Subsidy (Extra Help) flag (Y/N). Null when no Part D coverage.

columns.name: metal_level
columns.description: ACA metal tier (P/G/S/B/C). Null when non-ACA.

columns.name: csr_indicator
columns.description: Cost Sharing Reduction variant indicator (1-11). Null when non-ACA.

columns.name: enrollment_duration_months
columns.description: Number of months covered during the benefit year (1-12). Null when non-ACA.

columns.name: esrd_status
columns.description: ESRD clinical status (dialysis, graft, transplant). Null when non-ESRD.

columns.name: transplant_duration_months
columns.description: Months since kidney transplant. Null when non-ESRD or non-transplant.

columns.name: fips_state_code
columns.description: FIPS code for the state the patient lives in (most recent known address).

columns.name: normalized_state_name
columns.description: State for the patient (most recent known address).

columns.name: fips_state_abbreviation
columns.description: Abbreviated form of the state for the patient (most recient known address).

columns.name: subscriber_relation
columns.description: The patient's relationship to the subscriber (e.g., self, spouse, child).

columns.name: group_id
columns.description: The group id which multiple members are enrolled for health coverage.

columns.name: group_name
columns.description: The group name under which multiple members are enrolled for health coverage.

columns.name: data_source
columns.description: User-configured field that indicates the data source.

columns.name: file_date
columns.description: The date associated with the claims file, typically reflecting the reporting period of the claims data.

columns.name: ingest_datetime
columns.description: The date and time the source file was ingested into the data warehouse or landed in cloud storage.

columns.name: tuva_last_run
columns.description: The last time the data was refreshed. Generated by `dbt_utils.pretty_time` as the local time of the `dbt run` environment. Timezone is configurable via the `tuva_last_run` var.

nodes.name: semantic_layer__stg_reference_data__calendar
nodes.description: Staging table for calendar object
nodes.sql:
{{ config(
     enabled = var('semantic_layer_enabled',False) | as_bool
   )
}}

SELECT
    cal.full_date
  , cal.year
  , cal.month
  , cal.day
  , cal.month_name
  , cal.day_of_week_number
  , cal.day_of_week_name
  , cal.week_of_year
  , cal.day_of_year
  , cal.year_month
  , cal.first_day_of_month
  , cal.last_day_of_month
  , cal.year_month_int
  , cast('{{ var('tuva_last_run') }}' as {{ dbt.type_timestamp() }}) as tuva_last_run
FROM {{ ref('reference_data__calendar') }} cal

columns.name: header_flag
columns.description: Indicates a diagnosis "header" with a 1. A value of 1 means the code is NOT billable for HIPAA covered entities, and is just included in the ICD-10-CM listing for organizational purposes. A value of 0 indicates the code IS billable for HIPAA covered entities and is a valid diagnosis code. It should be uncommon for codes in claims or clinical data sources to contain header values, but if you want to ensure you are not capturing non-billable codes, filter out all codes from this table where header_flag = 1

nodes.name: CCSR
nodes.description: This model contains a mapping of individual condition ICD-10-CM diagnosis codes to the CCSR's clinically meaningful diagnosis categories. Each row represents a mapping of an ICD-10 code to a CCSR category. As each ICD-10  code may be mapped to up to 6 categories, it's expected that this table will output as many or more rows than the TUVA condition model. The model is equivalent to the CCSR's Output Option 1 - Vertical File Output.

columns.name: encounter_id
columns.description: Unique identifier for each the encounter.

columns.name: claim_id
columns.description: Unique identifier for each claim.

columns.name: person_id
columns.description: Unique identifier for each patient.

columns.name: normalized_code
columns.description: The ICD-10-CM code for the diagnosis.
columns.terminologyNote: **Note: this terminology set is too large to be loaded as a seed and is instead loaded from public cloud storage for supported adapters.

columns.name: code_description
columns.description: The ICD-10-CM code description provided in the CCSR CSV seed file.

columns.name: condition_rank
columns.description: The numerical ranking of a diagnosis code in a claim.

columns.name: body_system
columns.description: The body system to which each parent category belongs. The 22 body systems generally follow the structure of the ICD-10-CM diagnosis chapters. Note that the procedure tables don't have this column, but a conceptually related field in procedure models is `clinical_domain`.

columns.name: ccsr_parent_category
columns.description: The parent category code for each CCSR category. In practice, this is the three letter prefix to the category code.

columns.name: parent_category_description
columns.description: A description of the parent category.

columns.name: ccsr_category
columns.description: A CCSR category for the ICD-10-CM code. One ICD-10-CM code may have up 6 CCSR categories associated, ordinally ranked by the ccsr_category_rank. Will be null if a record has a `code` that isn't referenced in the CCSR seed file.

columns.name: ccsr_category_description
columns.description: The description of the CCSR category as provided in the CCSR seed file.

columns.name: ccsr_category_rank
columns.description: The ordinal rank of a given CCSR category mapped to an ICD-10-CM code.  The CCSR seed CSV has the order of categories assigned to each ICD-10-CM code.

columns.name: is_ip_default_category
columns.description: For each ICD-10-CM code, this field will return true for the CCSR category that is the default value for the code if the underlying record is an inpatient encounter.

columns.name: is_op_default_category
columns.description: For each ICD-10-CM code, this field will return true for the CCSR category that is the default value for the code if the underlying record is an outpatient encounter.

columns.name: dxccsr_version
columns.description: The version number of the CCSR program from which the dbt model was derived.

columns.name: tuva_last_run
columns.description: The time at with the model was materialized. Generated by  `dbt_utils.pretty_time` as the local time of the `dbt run` environment.   Timezone is configurable via the `tuva_last_run` var.

columns.description: Ending date of the performance or measurement period.

columns.name: denominator_sum
columns.description: The denominator is associated with a given patient population that may be counted as eligible to meet a measure’s inclusion requirements.

columns.name: numerator_sum
columns.description: The numerator reflects the subset of patients in the denominator for whom a particular service has been provided or for whom a particular outcome has been achieved with exclusion logic applied.

columns.name: exclusion_sum
columns.description: Specifications of those characteristics that would cause groups of individuals to be removed from the numerator and/or denominator of a measure although they experience the denominator index event.

columns.name: performance_rate
columns.description: Calculated performance rate. The numerator sum divided by the denominator sum after exclusion logic applied and multiplied by 100.

columns.description: The date and timestamp of the dbt run.

columns.name: invalid_primary_diagnosis_code_flag
columns.description: A flag that indicates whether the primary diagnosis present for this encounter is invalid, i.e. a non existing ICD-10-CM code. This flag indicates that a primary diagnosis code is indeed present for the encounter, but it is not a valid ICD-10-CM code.

columns.name: no_diagnosis_ccs_flag
columns.description: A flag that indicates whether there is no CCS diagnosis category associated with the primary ICD-10-CM diagnosis code for the encounter. This flag indicates that there is a valid primary ICD-10-CM diagnosis code associated with the encounter, but there is no CCS diagnosis category associated with that ICD-10-CM code.

columns.name: overlaps_with_another_encounter_flag
columns.description: A flag that indicates whether this encounter's dates overlap with those of another encounter in the dataset

columns.description: A flag that indicates whether this encounter contains a claim with a missing ms-drg code

columns.name: invalid_ms_drg_flag
columns.description: A flag that indicates whether this encounter contains a claim with an invalid missing ms-drg code

with claim_provider_data as (

        on c.rendering_npi = p.npi
    group BY
        c.encounter_id
        , c.rendering_npi
        , p.specialty
),
rank_ordered as (
    select
        encounter_id
      , rendering_npi
      , specialty
      , paid_amount
      , tuva_last_run
      , row_number() over (partition by encounter_id order by paid_amount desc) as rn
    from claim_provider_data
)

SELECT
    encounter_id
  , rendering_npi as primary_provider_id
  , specialty
  , tuva_last_run
from rank_ordered
where rn = 1

      , person_id
      , normalized_risk_score
    FROM {{ ref('semantic_layer__stg_cms_hcc__patient_risk_scores_monthly') }}
),

monthly_population_risk_cte AS (
    SELECT
        {{ year_month('collection_end_date') }} AS year_month
      , AVG(normalized_risk_score) AS monthly_avg_risk_score
    FROM {{ ref('semantic_layer__stg_cms_hcc__patient_risk_scores_monthly') }}
    GROUP BY
        {{ year_month('collection_end_date') }}
),
combined_data_cte AS (
    SELECT
        mm.person_id
      , mm.data_source
      , {{ concat_strings(["mm.person_id", "'|'", "mm.data_source"]) }} AS patient_source_key
      , {{ concat_strings(["mm.person_id", "'|'", "mm.year_month"]) }} as member_month_sk
      , mm.year_month
      , 1 AS member_months_value
      , mpr.normalized_risk_score
      , CASE
          WHEN pop_risk.monthly_avg_risk_score IS NOT NULL AND pop_risk.monthly_avg_risk_score != 0
          THEN mpr.normalized_risk_score / pop_risk.monthly_avg_risk_score
          ELSE NULL

      , LEFT(mm.year_month, 4) AS year_nbr
      , pc.inpatient_paid

    LEFT JOIN monthly_patient_risk_cte mpr
        ON mm.person_id = mpr.person_id AND mm.year_month = mpr.year_month
    LEFT JOIN monthly_population_risk_cte pop_risk
        ON mm.year_month = pop_risk.year_month
    LEFT JOIN monthly_patient_costs pc

SELECT

  , cd.member_month_sk
  , cd.member_months_value AS member_months
  , SUM(cd.member_months_value) OVER (PARTITION BY cd.person_id, cd.year_nbr) AS total_year_months
  , CASE
      WHEN SUM(cd.member_months_value) OVER (PARTITION BY cd.person_id, cd.year_nbr) > 0
      THEN CAST(cd.member_months_value AS {{ dbt.type_numeric() }}) / SUM(cd.member_months_value) OVER (PARTITION BY cd.person_id, cd.year_nbr)
      ELSE CAST(0 AS {{ dbt.type_numeric() }})
    END AS MonthAllocationFactor

nodes.name: semantic_layer__fact_pharmacy_claims
nodes.description: Pharmacy claim data from core object.
nodes.sql:
{{ config(
    enabled = var('semantic_layer_enabled', False) and var('claims_enabled', False)
) }}

select
    p.claim_id
  , p.claim_line_number
  , p.person_id
  , p.data_source
  , {{ concat_custom(['p.person_id', "'|'", 'p.data_source']) }} as patient_source_key
  , p.ndc_code
  , coalesce(n.fda_description, n.rxnorm_description) as ndc_description
  , p.paid_amount
  , p.allowed_amount
  , p.prescribing_provider_id
  , p.prescribing_provider_name
  , prac.specialty as prescribing_specialty
  , p.dispensing_provider_id
  , p.dispensing_provider_name
  , p.paid_date
  , p.dispensing_date
  , p.days_supply
  , case 
      when p.days_supply = 0 then null
      else p.paid_amount / p.days_supply
    end as cost_per_day
  , case 
      when p.days_supply = 0 then null
      else (p.paid_amount / p.days_supply) * 30
    end as thirty_day_equivalent_cost
  , case 
      when p.days_supply = 0 then 0
      when (p.paid_amount / p.days_supply) * 30 >= 950 then 1
      else 0 
    end as specialty_tier -- $950 is the threshold set by CMS for CY 2024
  , n.rxcui
  , n.rxnorm_description
  , r.brand_name
  , r.brand_vs_generic
  , r.ingredient_name
  , a.atc_1_name
  , a.atc_2_name
  , a.atc_3_name
  , a.atc_4_name
  , pe.generic_available_total_opportunity
  , pe.generic_average_cost_per_unit * p.quantity as generic_cost_at_units
  , pe.brand_cost_per_unit * p.quantity as brand_paid_amount
  , pe.generic_available
  , pe.generic_available_sk
  , p.tuva_last_run
from {{ ref('semantic_layer__stg_core__pharmacy_claim') }} as p
left outer join {{ ref('terminology__ndc') }} as n 
  on p.ndc_code = n.ndc
left outer join {{ ref('terminology__rxnorm_brand_generic') }} as r 
  on n.rxcui = r.product_rxcui
left outer join {{ ref('terminology__rxnorm_to_atc') }} as a 
  on n.rxcui = a.rxcui
left outer join {{ ref('semantic_layer__stg_core__practitioner') }} as prac 
  on p.prescribing_provider_id = prac.practitioner_id
left outer join {{ ref('semantic_layer__stg_pharmacy__pharmacy_claim_expanded') }} as pe 
  on p.data_source = pe.data_source
  and p.claim_id = pe.claim_id
  and p.claim_line_number = pe.claim_line_number

nodes.name: semantic_layer__fact_claims
nodes.description: Claim line level fact for use in Power BI data models.
nodes.sql:
{{ config(
     enabled = var('semantic_layer_enabled', False) and var('claims_enabled', False)
   )
}}

with encounter_sk as (
    select
        e.encounter_id
      , e.encounter_group_sk
      , e.encounter_type_sk
      , e.primary_diagnosis_code
      , e.primary_diagnosis_description
      , primary_provider_id
      , specialty
      , ccsr.ccsr_parent_category
      , ccsr.ccsr_category
      , ccsr.ccsr_category_description
    from {{ ref('semantic_layer__fact_encounters') }} e
    left join {{ ref('semantic_layer__dim_encounter_provider') }} p on e.encounter_id = p.encounter_id
    left join {{ ref('ccsr__dx_vertical_pivot') }} ccsr on e.primary_diagnosis_code = ccsr.code
        and ccsr.ccsr_category_rank = 1
)

select
    mc.medical_claim_id
  , mc.encounter_id
  , esk.encounter_group_sk
  , esk.encounter_type_sk
  , esk.primary_diagnosis_code
  , esk.primary_diagnosis_description
  , esk.primary_provider_id
  , esk.specialty
  , esk.ccsr_parent_category
  , esk.ccsr_category
  , esk.ccsr_category_description
  , mc.person_id
  , {{ concat_strings(["mc.person_id", "'|'", "mc.data_source"]) }} as patient_source_key
  , {{ concat_strings(["mc.person_id", "'|'", the_tuva_project.yyyymm("mc.claim_start_date")]) }} as member_month_sk
  , {{ yyyymm("mc.claim_start_date") }} as year_month
  , sc.service_category_sk
  , mc.claim_id
  , mc.claim_line_number
  , mc.claim_type
  , mc.payer
  , mc.{{ quote_column('plan') }}
  , mc.claim_start_date
  , mc.claim_end_date
  , mc.claim_line_start_date
  , mc.claim_line_end_date
  , mc.admission_date
  , mc.discharge_date
  , mc.admit_source_code
  , mc.admit_source_description
  , mc.admit_type_code
  , mc.admit_type_description
  , mc.discharge_disposition_code
  , mc.discharge_disposition_description
  , mc.place_of_service_code
  , mc.place_of_service_description
  , mc.bill_type_code
  , mc.bill_type_description
  , mc.drg_code_type
  , mc.drg_code
  , mc.drg_description
  , mc.revenue_center_code
  , mc.revenue_center_description
  , mc.service_unit_quantity
  , mc.hcpcs_code
  , mc.hcpcs_modifier_1
  , mc.hcpcs_modifier_2
  , mc.hcpcs_modifier_3
  , mc.hcpcs_modifier_4
  , mc.hcpcs_modifier_5
  , mc.rendering_npi
  , mc.rendering_tin
  , mc.rendering_name
  , mc.billing_npi
  , mc.billing_tin
  , mc.billing_name
  , mc.facility_npi
  , mc.facility_name
  , mc.paid_date
  , mc.paid_amount
  , mc.allowed_amount
  , mc.charge_amount
  , mc.coinsurance_amount
  , mc.copayment_amount
  , mc.deductible_amount
  , mc.total_cost_amount
  , mc.in_network_flag
  , mc.data_source
  , mc.tuva_last_run
from {{ ref('semantic_layer__stg_core__medical_claim') }} as mc
INNER JOIN {{ ref('semantic_layer__dim_service_category') }} as sc on mc.service_category_1 = sc.service_category_1
    AND mc.service_category_2 = sc.service_category_2
    AND mc.service_category_3 = sc.service_category_3
INNER JOIN encounter_sk esk on mc.encounter_id = esk.encounter_id
INNER JOIN {{ ref('semantic_layer__dim_data_source') }} as ds on mc.data_source = ds.data_source
WHERE enrollment_flag = 1
